title: Horrorbrew Hysteria
description: A Minecraft mod mainly based around Horrorbrews (and Mario's Madness)
body:
(Requires [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) to work properly)

Welcome to Horrorbrew Hysteria! A Minecraft mod that throws in popular Mario creepypastas into Minecraft. Most of the cast here is mainly from the FNF Mod, Mario's Madness, but some other Horrorbrews also make an appearance here!

Creepypastas/Horrorbrews include:

-Mario's Madness

-Mario 64 Urban legends

-'the

-Black and White

-Mario 85

-SMW hack MARIO

-I HATE YOU creepypasta

-Too Late.EXE

...and more to come soon.

And when M once said, "He'll get you next time"...






...**MAYBE THAT DAY IS NEARING SOON.**
